column1: # Create: scan the first data row of the input column, classify each
# char (digit/sign/dot → V, whitespace → gap, anything else → L),
# emit a marker per class change and `>` for continuations. Write
# the result to the cell at the top of the input column.
# Edit: jump to the format-line cell and open it in EDIT mode so
# the user can tweak markers before /DPG.
# Seed: A1 stays empty for the format line, A2 = "abc 100".
# Set the input column FIRST, then run Create.
# A1 should now hold the generated format line `|L>> V>>` .
# Edit jumps the pointer to A1 and opens EDIT — use it to assert.
